headline: Is ProPetro (PUMP) Using Its ESOP Shelf To Quietly Redraw Its Capital Allocation Priorities?
summary: In early June 2026, ProPetro Holding Corp. filed a US$66.52 million shelf registration for up to 4,071,000 common shares tied to an employee stock ownership plan, while also confirming the resignation of director Alex V. Volkov and the reduction of its board from eight to seven members. These moves followed the exit of Pioneer Natural Resources Pumping Services, an Exxon Mobil subsidiary that had sold its remaining ProPetro shares and consequently lost its right to nominate directors,...
